final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: museum exhibition panel, educational infographic
Primary request: Chinese ethnic minority costume illustrated breakdown infographic in museum collection style
Scene/backdrop: museum display panel with rice paper / silk paper texture background in off-white, pale tea, and cream tones, clean and archival
Subject: Miao/Hmong silver-embroidered festival costume with pleated skirt, silver headdress, and embroidered jacket as central full-body figure in standing pose
Style/medium: technical illustration mixed with photorealistic rendering, archival museum documentation style, restrained and scholarly aesthetic
Composition/framing: structured infographic layout with labeled zones - top header, left structural breakdown with callout lines, upper-right material texture samples, mid-right color palette and pattern meaning section, bottom wearing sequence flowchart
Lighting/mood: even diffused museum lighting, neutral and professional atmosphere, no dramatic shadows
Color palette: archival paper tones (off-white, beige, pale tea) + costume colors (indigo blue, silver, red embroidery, black cloth)
Materials/textures: hand-woven hemp cloth, wax-resist dyed indigo fabric, hand-hammered silver ornaments, silk embroidery threads, detailed close-up swatches
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰"
Constraints: all text must be clear simplified Chinese characters, proper structural labeling, authentic material representation, museum-grade presentation
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio portrait feel, e-commerce layout, anime style, cosplay vibe, messy labels, incorrect structures, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration, English or pinyin text
